message.content:
Based on the screenshot of the Jariyah Now app's sidebar (settings panel), here's a detailed breakdown:

### 1. Reciter Section
The 'Reciter' section appears as a card with a purple header icon (resembling a microphone or speaker symbol). It contains:
- A purple circular avatar with "MR" initials
- The name "Mishary Rashid Alafasy" in bold text
- The style "Murattal" in smaller gray text below the name
- The Arabic name "مشاري راشد العفاسي" (Mishary Rashid Alafasy) in Arabic script
- A dropdown arrow on the right side
- Below this is a second entry with the same information, but with a checkmark (✓) indicating the currently selected reciter

### 2. Translation Section
The 'Translation' section has a blue header icon (resembling a book or document symbol) and shows:
- The language "বাংলা — Bengali" (Bengali in both Bengali script and English)
- "UmmahAPI Bengali edition" in smaller gray text
- Below this is the full license text: "Quran Bengali Translation" followed by "Bengali translation. Permitted for non-commercial use with attribution."
- A purple "NON-COMMERCIAL" badge on the right side
- A dropdown arrow on the right side

### 3. Other UI Elements Visible
- A purple "Load ayats" button at the bottom with a download icon
- The section header "Ayah Selection" at the top
- A "SURAH" section showing "Al-Baqarah" (The Cow - 286 ayats - Medinan) with Arabic name "البقرة" and a dropdown arrow
- An "AYAT RANGE" section with "FROM" and "TO" fields showing "Ayat 1" and "Ayat 3" with dropdown arrows
- A counter "3 / 10" in the top right of the ayat range section
- Text stating "Al-Baqarah has 286 ayats."
